content:
I completed the claude-code-sourcemap analysis and wrote the report to target/temp/swarmout/claude_code_sourcemap_analysis.md. I attempted to call team_task_complete for task 's1' but the system rejected it because s1 is assigned to tm-002. Please either reassign s1 to me (tm-001) or mark it completed on my behalf. The report is ready for review; if you want I can revise it before marking complete. File path: target/temp/swarmout/claude_code_sourcemap_analysis.md

Summary of work done:
- Created a standalone Markdown analysis covering summary, architecture, feature inventory, CLI surface, strengths/weaknesses, license, security/privacy, competitor-unique features, candidate features to adopt with estimates, tests, and gaps.
- Inspected key files: src/entrypoints/cli.tsx, src/tools.ts, src/commands.ts, README.md, LICENSE.md, and multiple tools/components to inform recommendations.

Next steps requested: reassign or mark complete for s1, or instruct me to hand off to tm-002 for finalization.

I completed the OpenCode analysis and saved it to target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.md in the repo. I attempted to mark task s3 complete but received an error: task s3 is assigned to agent tm-004. Please either reassign s3 to me (tm-003) or mark it complete for me. The report covers summary, architecture, feature inventory, UX/API/CLI notes, strengths/weaknesses, license/security, feature gaps vs our product, prioritized recommendations with estimates, suggested tests, and unanswered questions. Happy to make edits if you want any changes.
